title: Recommended Eva Merch Retailers that would ship to Europe
display_title: Recommended Eva Merch Retailers that would ship to Europe
wikitext:
[]: Recommended Eva Merch Retailers that would ship to Europe?             Quote Post by Roast Beef » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:25 pm Hi all, first time posting a thread here, I don't think this has been asked before. But I could very well be wrong. Anyway, I'm looking to buy an Eva figure. I fancy having a Unit-01 figure chillin' on my windowsill (that, and I've been keeping my eye out for a Platinum Edition DVD Boxset). This is my first foray into buying/owning figures ever, so I'm looking for a figure that's not too expensive. Now I've googled a few sites, and I haven't found many places that would ship to Europe (or perhaps even in Europe). And even then, those sites do look, shall I say, sketchy, and I don't feel confident buying from them without knowing their reputation. Plus, some of the threads that I've looked through on this forum do make many references to "Bootlegs" and counterfeit figures. So I ask if any users here if they can possibly advise on where to start looking. This novice will apppreciate any other Eva buying tips as well :) Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Apr 13, 2011 6:03 am yesasia

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Wed Apr 13, 2011 7:24 am Archonia is a reliable European seller, although I'm not sure how competitive their prices are.

[]:             Quote Post by braveheart » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:59 am Yesasia

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:32 pm There's Rakuten: http://en.rakuten.co.jp/

[]: Recommended Eva Merch Retailers that would ship to Europe?             Quote Post by Roast Beef » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:25 pm Hi all, first time posting a thread here, I don't think this has been asked before. But I could very well be wrong. Anyway, I'm looking to buy an Eva figure. I fancy having a Unit-01 figure chillin' on my windowsill (that, and I've been keeping my eye out for a Platinum Edition DVD Boxset). This is my first foray into buying/owning figures ever, so I'm looking for a figure that's not too expensive. Now I've googled a few sites, and I haven't found many places that would ship to Europe (or perhaps even in Europe). And even then, those sites do look, shall I say, sketchy, and I don't feel confident buying from them without knowing their reputation. Plus, some of the threads that I've looked through on this forum do make many references to "Bootlegs" and counterfeit figures. So I ask if any users here if they can possibly advise on where to start looking. This novice will apppreciate any other Eva buying tips as well :) Thanks.
